question: What is the citation of the Banking and Financial Institutions (Licensing) Regulations, 2014, and under what gazette notice were they published?
ideal_answer_points: Cited as the Banking and Financial Institutions (Licensing) Regulations, 2014
Published under G.N. No. 297 on 22/08/2014

question: What does Part I of the Licensing Regulations, 2014 cover?
ideal_answer_points: Preliminary provisions: citation, application, interpretation, objectives

question: Which Part of the Licensing Regulations covers the application for a banking licence?
ideal_answer_points: Part II: Application for Licence
Covers application for licence (reg 5) and feasibility study (reg 6)

question: What areas does the Bank assess under Part III of the Licensing Regulations when considering a licence application?
ideal_answer_points: Principal contact person, legal opinion, financial capacity, source of capital, assurance of capital, integrity in financial and business dealings, character and experience, contribution to the country's economy, disclosure of intended products and services, training and succession plans

question: What does regulation 7 of the Licensing Regulations, 2014 require an applicant to provide?
ideal_answer_points: A principal contact person

question: What is the subject of regulation 12 of the Licensing Regulations, 2014?
ideal_answer_points: Integrity in financial and business dealings

question: What does Part IV of the Licensing Regulations, 2014 address?
ideal_answer_points: Organisation, ownership and minimum capital
Regulation 17 covers the legal form of a bank or financial institution

question: Which regulation of the Licensing Regulations, 2014 concerns an applicant's contribution to the country's economy?
ideal_answer_points: Regulation 14

question: Which regulation requires disclosure of a licence applicant's intended products and services?
ideal_answer_points: Regulation 15

question: Does the Licensing Regulations, 2014 include a schedule with a projected balance sheet format for applicants?
ideal_answer_points: Yes, a schedule includes a projected balance sheet format covering items such as cash, balances with the Bank of Tanzania, loans/advances, deposits, and capital

question: What does regulation 16 of the Licensing Regulations, 2014 cover?
ideal_answer_points: Training and succession plans

question: What does regulation 6 of the Licensing Regulations, 2014 require as part of a licence application?
ideal_answer_points: A feasibility study

question: What is the citation of the 2022 amendment to the Banking and Financial Institutions (Licensing) Regulations, and under what gazette notice was it published?
ideal_answer_points: Cited as the Banking and Financial Institutions (Licensing) (Amendment) Regulations, 2022
Published under G.N. No. 13 on 20/01/2023

question: Which principal regulations does the 2022 Licensing Amendment modify?
ideal_answer_points: The Banking and Financial Institutions (Licensing) Regulations, 2014 (G.N. No. 297 of 2014)

question: What does regulation 2 of the 2022 Licensing Amendment do to the principal regulations?
ideal_answer_points: Amends the principal regulations by deleting and substituting a regulation

question: Which regulation of the 2014 Licensing Regulations was deleted and substituted by the 2022 amendment?
ideal_answer_points: Regulation 40

question: Has regulation 40 of the Banking and Financial Institutions (Licensing) Regulations, 2014 been amended, and if so, by what instrument?
ideal_answer_points: Yes — deleted and substituted by the Licensing (Amendment) Regulations, 2022 (G.N. No. 13 of 2023)

question: If I am reading a pre-2023 copy of the Licensing Regulations, is regulation 40 still accurate today?
ideal_answer_points: No — regulation 40 was replaced by the 2022 amendment (G.N. No. 13 of 2023); the answer should flag this as a point-in-time distinction

question: Is the Banking and Financial Institutions (Licensing) Regulations, 2014 still in force overall, despite the 2022 amendment?
ideal_answer_points: Yes — only regulation 40 was amended, the Regulations as a whole remain in force

question: What is the citation of the Capital Adequacy Regulations, 2023, and under what gazette notice were they published?
ideal_answer_points: Cited as the Banking and Financial Institutions (Capital Adequacy) Regulations, 2023
Published under G.N. No. 727 on 06/10/2023, made under section 71 of Cap. 342

question: What minimum common equity Tier 1 capital ratio must a bank maintain under the Capital Adequacy Regulations, 2023?
ideal_answer_points: Not less than 8.5% of total risk-weighted assets

question: What minimum Tier 1 capital ratio must a bank maintain under the Capital Adequacy Regulations, 2023?
ideal_answer_points: Not less than 10% of total risk-weighted assets

question: What minimum total capital ratio must a bank maintain under the Capital Adequacy Regulations, 2023?
ideal_answer_points: Not less than 12% of total risk-weighted assets and off-balance-sheet exposures

question: What capital conservation buffer must banks maintain under the Capital Adequacy Regulations, 2023?
ideal_answer_points: 2.5% of total risk-weighted assets and off-balance-sheet exposures, made up of common equity Tier 1 capital

question: What minimum leverage ratio must a bank maintain under the Capital Adequacy Regulations, 2023?
ideal_answer_points: At least 7%

question: What is the minimum Tier 1 capital for a fully-fledged commercial bank under the First Schedule of the Capital Adequacy Regulations?
ideal_answer_points: Fifteen billion shillings

question: What is the minimum Tier 1 capital for a microfinance bank under the First Schedule of the Capital Adequacy Regulations?
ideal_answer_points: Five billion shillings

question: What is the minimum Tier 1 capital for a community bank under the First Schedule of the Capital Adequacy Regulations?
ideal_answer_points: Two billion shillings

question: What is the minimum Tier 1 capital for a Development Finance Institution under the First Schedule of the Capital Adequacy Regulations?
ideal_answer_points: Two hundred billion shillings

question: What is the minimum Tier 1 capital for a Mortgage Refinance Company under the First Schedule of the Capital Adequacy Regulations?
ideal_answer_points: Thirty billion shillings

question: Under which regulation is the First Schedule of minimum Tier 1 capital requirements made?
ideal_answer_points: Regulation 5

question: What is the citation of the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015?
ideal_answer_points: Cited as the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015

question: Under which Act and section are the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015 made?
ideal_answer_points: Made under section 56(1) and (2)(c) of the National Payment Systems Act, 2015

question: What does Part I of the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015 cover?
ideal_answer_points: Preliminary provisions: citation and interpretation

question: What does Part II of the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015 cover?
ideal_answer_points: Electronic money issuance approval

question: What does regulation 3 of the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015 concern?
ideal_answer_points: Application for electronic money approval

question: What does regulation 4 of the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015 concern?
ideal_answer_points: Consideration of the application

question: What does regulation 5 of the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015 concern?
ideal_answer_points: Review of the Bank's decision to reject an application

question: Under what gazette notice number were the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015 published?
ideal_answer_points: The gazette notice number is not filled in on the available copy — the answer should say this is unavailable rather than guessing a number

question: On what date were the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015 published?
ideal_answer_points: The publication date is not filled in on the available copy — the answer should say this is unavailable rather than guessing a date

question: What is the overall subject matter of the Electronic Money Regulations, 2015?
ideal_answer_points: Approval and issuance of electronic money under the National Payment Systems Act, 2015

question: Kanuni za Matumizi ya Fedha za Kigeni za mwaka 2025 zilitangazwa lini na kwa Tangazo la Serikali lipi?
ideal_answer_points: Tangazo la Serikali Na. 198, tarehe 28 Machi 2025

question: Kanuni za Matumizi ya Fedha za Kigeni zimetengenezwa chini ya kifungu gani cha Sheria ya Benki Kuu ya Tanzania?
ideal_answer_points: Kifungu cha 70, Sura 197

question: Kanuni ya 2 ya Kanuni za Matumizi ya Fedha za Kigeni inasema nini kuhusu bei za bidhaa na huduma?
ideal_answer_points: Bei zote za bidhaa na huduma nchini zitatangazwa kwa shilingi ya Tanzania

question: Ni vitendo gani vinavyokatazwa chini ya kanuni ya 3 ya Kanuni za Matumizi ya Fedha za Kigeni?
ideal_answer_points: Kulazimisha au kutangaza bei kwa fedha ya kigeni, kulazimisha malipo kwa fedha ya kigeni, kukataa malipo ya shilingi, na kupokea malipo kwa fedha ya kigeni

question: Under Tanzania's 2025 Foreign Currency Usage Regulations, who may add to the list of transactions permitted to be conducted in foreign currency?
ideal_answer_points: The Minister, after consultation with the Governor

question: Kanuni ya 5 ya Kanuni za Matumizi ya Fedha za Kigeni inahusu nini?
ideal_answer_points: Katazo kwa mikataba ya malipo kwa fedha ya kigeni, isipokuwa yale yaliyoruhusiwa chini ya kanuni ya 4

ideal_answer_points: Foreign exchange matters relating to listed securities in Tanzania — this document is scanned; the answer's confidence depends on OCR quality and should not overstate certainty

question: Which institution issued the Foreign Exchange (Listed Securities) Regulations?
ideal_answer_points: The Bank of Tanzania
